name: Editorial Marginalia
description: Editorial portfolio + blog theme. Numbered section labels, paper-and-ink palette with terracotta accent, Crimson Pro + IBM Plex Mono. Curated case studies on a quiet landing, with a long-form writing index and a mock contact form.

primary.title: Primary nav
primary.description: Top nav rendered as small mono links beside the author identity

footer.title: Elsewhere
footer.description: Footer link list under the colophon

sidebar.title: Sidebar widgets
sidebar.description: Optional right-rail widget stack on category, tag, and archive routes

cases.title: Featured cases
cases.description: Curated case-study pages shown on the home page in order

recent-notes.title: Recent notes
recent-notes.description: Pre-sliced posts list shown on the home page (typically the latest three)
